issues.title: [Roadmap] Arcaea-Viewer Web MVP 0.1 — six-week production-grade fan wiki
issues.outcome: Deliver a small public Arcaea fan wiki that is fast, accessible, visually distinctive, legally reviewable, community-ready, and deployable without a production backend.
scope: Track the six weekly stage gates.
Keep runtime/viewer work outside the MVP critical path.
Link every active issue through sub-issues and dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: All six phase epics exist and have managed sub-issues.
The public-preview gate is represented by a final QA/release issue.
Post-MVP runtime and platform issues remain separated.
evidence: Screenshot or export of the issue hierarchy.
Link to the accepted product brief and roadmap.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.
